name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Standard Terms for a mutual NDA allowing two parties to exchange confidential information for a stated purpose, with customary confidentiality, term, and disclosure provisions.

name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement Cover Page
description: Cover Page used alongside the Mutual NDA Standard Terms to capture the parties, purpose, term, and governing law for a specific MNDA.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Standard Terms for a SaaS/cloud service agreement covering access and use, support, payment, term and termination, warranties, liability, indemnification, and confidentiality between a provider and customer.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Standard Terms for granting a design partner early access to a product in exchange for feedback, covering product improvement rights, confidentiality, and termination.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Standard Terms defining uptime and support response time commitments, service credit remedies, and termination rights for failing to meet targets.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Standard Terms for a provider performing services under one or more statements of work, covering deliverables, intellectual property, payment, warranties, liability, and confidentiality.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Standard Terms governing the processing of personal data between a controller/processor and processor/subprocessor, including subprocessors, international transfers (EEA SCCs/UK Addendum), security incidents, and audit rights.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Standard Terms for an on-premises or installed software license, covering license grant, restrictions, updates, open source software, warranties, liability, and confidentiality.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Standard Terms for a business partnership between two companies, covering mutual obligations, trademark licensing, payment, confidentiality, and termination.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Standard Terms for a time-limited pilot or trial of a product for evaluation purposes, covering access, restrictions, warranties, liability, and confidentiality.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Standard Terms required under HIPAA for a business associate handling protected health information (PHI) on behalf of a covered entity, covering permitted uses, safeguards, breach notification, and termination.

name: AI Addendum
description: Standard Terms supplementing a product agreement to govern the use of AI/ML features, covering inputs, outputs, model training, intellectual property, and AI-specific disclaimers.
